artPrompt: An earnest human petitioner striding across a sunlit town green, clipboard thrust forward and pen offered, a determined hopeful smile and a tote bag of blank illegible petition sheets at the hip, golden afternoon light glinting on tidy front yards and picket fences behind. Vigilant and tireless, ready for a long signature. The figure fills the central wide frame, blank lawn placards dotting the soft green backdrop. Wide 4:3 landscape, Selesnya leafy green and warm ivory, wholesome civic fervor, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Clipboard Canvasser
text:
Vigilance
Whenever Clipboard Canvasser attacks, collect a signature: create a 1/1 green and white Voter creature token tapped and attacking.
flavorText: "Got a minute for the recall? Great. Got another? It's a long petition."
